# zitadel_instance_restrictions (Data Source)

Datasource representing the instance restrictions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "zitadel_instance_restrictions" "default" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `allowed_languages` (Set of String) Allowed languages (BCP 47 language tags) for the instance
- `disallow_public_org_registration` (Boolean) Disallow public organization registration for the instance
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
